scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const targets=['dist','.pnpm-store','src-tauri/target','src-tauri/run.out','src-tauri/run.err']; for (const t of targets){ const p=path.resolve(t); if (fs.existsSync(p)){ fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); console.log('removed',t); } }"
scripts.build:clean: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build
